calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Loretta Najera. Petitioner, Della Mcawley was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing Petitioner's name to Della Brighde Mae. Decree signed in open court.
